title: Trondheim Heavy Rain
lead: Trondheim is experiencing extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of -4.37. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is witnessing an unusual amount of rainfall, with significant impacts on daily life.
Heavy rain is causing disruptions to transportation and infrastructure, with potential flooding in low-lying areas.
The high humidity of 86% and moderate wind speed of 11.2 km/h are exacerbating the situation.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme weather event.
